[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000111 3
1 00000110 2
2 10100100 3
3 00010101 3
4 00010101 3
5 10000001 2
6 00000000 a
7 00000000 a

01 10 00000000 a match 6 7
12 21 00101010 3
23 32 00000111 3 match 0
34 43 00000110 2 match 1
45 54 10100100 3 match 2
56 65 00010101 3 match 3 4
67 76 00010101 3 match 3 4
70 07 10000001 2 match 5

02 20 00000001 1
13 31 00000010 1
24 42 00100110 3
35 53 00000101 2
46 64 00000100 1
57 75 10011101 5
60 06 00000001 1
71 17 01011010 4

03 30 00000001 1
14 41 01100010 3
25 52 00101101 4
36 63 00000101 2
47 74 11000110 4
50 05 10000001 2 match 5
61 16 00010000 1
72 27 00001111 4

04 40 10000000 1
15 51 00111000 3
26 62 00000101 2
37 73 00000111 3 match 0
